# Frequency

> Frequency is rebuilding the "third place": real-world community built around a physical space (The Lab), small local groups (Circles, sorted by topical Channels under four life Pillars), and a light, transparent game (The Quest) that rewards showing up in person. Not another feed, a place to be seen in person, missed when you are gone, and welcomed for who you are. Free during the beta, taking root in North County San Diego.

## What it is
Frequency connects neighborhoods into real-world community. Members find their people by topic, join a Circle (a small standing local group), show up to nearby Events, and gather at The Lab (a physical third space with a sauna, cold plunge, movement studios, and gathering rooms). The Quest is an in-person-first game that rewards real life over scrolling. The model: Place (The Lab), People (The Community), Path (The Quest).

## Key pages
- [The Lab](https://frequencylocal.com/the-lab): the physical third space, what it is and why community needs a body.
- [The Community](https://frequencylocal.com/the-community): how you find your people, through Pillars, Channels, and Circles.
- [The Quest](https://frequencylocal.com/the-quest): the gamified path, Zaps and Gems, season ranks, and Journeys.
- [About](https://frequencylocal.com/about): the mission and the origin story.
- [Discover](https://frequencylocal.com/discover): live Circles and Events near you, sorted by Channel.
- [Join the Beta](https://frequencylocal.com/onboarding/beta): begin the founding-member induction.

## Vocabulary
- Pillar: one of four life areas (Mind, Body, Spirit, Expression) that organize everything.
- Channel: a topical forum that sorts under a Pillar. The seven are Spirituality, Movement, Holistic Health, Human Relating, Activism, Creative, and Business Support. You "tune in" to a Channel.
- Circle: a small standing local group that meets in person, sorted under a Channel.
- The Lab: the physical third space; the first is in North County San Diego.
- The Quest: the year-round game. Zaps are the in-person currency that drive season ranks (Ghost, Echo, Signal, Beacon, Conduit, Luminary). Gems are the durable currency, earned online and from the season rollover, spent in the Vault Store. Journeys are guided, multi-step programs a Circle moves through together as a cohort.

## Structure
- Community: Pillar > Channel > Circle (Circles group into Hubs, Hubs into a Nexus).
- Game: Quest > Journey > Practice (a Practice is one core real-world act).

## Facts
- Free during the beta. No card required. Founder pricing is locked for life. Leave anytime.
- First location: North County San Diego; the community can be started anywhere.
- Four Pillars (Mind, Body, Spirit, Expression) and seven Channels organize every Circle and topic.
- Season ranks in order: Ghost, Echo, Signal, Beacon, Conduit, Luminary.
- Nonprofit-spirited: memberships sustain the physical spaces and hold the door for those who cannot pay. The rule is "circulation, not exclusion."
- Contact: hello@frequencylocal.com
